name: Planday Workforce Management API
what_it_does: European workforce management and shift scheduling platform with REST API — covering shift scheduling, time tracking, absence management, and HR documentation for retail, hospitality, and service industries, with strong payroll integration for European markets.
use_cases: Creating and managing shift schedules for hourly workers via API
Syncing Planday time clock data to European payroll systems
Managing employee absence requests and holiday accrual via API
Integrating Planday scheduling with POS systems for optimal staffing
Querying worked hours and schedule data for payroll calculation
not_for: Knowledge worker scheduling (use Float or Resource Guru)
North American-focused workforce management (US compliance features limited)
Simple free scheduling for very small teams
best_when: A European hospitality, retail, or service business needs workforce scheduling with strong EU payroll integration and compliance for hourly workers.
avoid_when: You operate primarily in North America, need knowledge worker scheduling, or require only simple free scheduling tools.

auth.notes: OAuth2 Authorization Code for partner integrations. Client ID and secret required. Scoped access: schedule read/write, HR data, payroll data. OpenAPI specification available. Danish company — GDPR-first auth design.

pricing.paid_tiers: Starter from $3.99/user/month; Plus from $6.99/user/month; Pro from $9.99/user/month; Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: Per-user pricing for active employees. No free tier. Danish company (Copenhagen) — acquired by Xero in 2021. Strong European market focus. API via partner program. Good payroll integrations for Scandinavia, UK, Netherlands. 400,000+ employees scheduled daily.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API with OpenAPI specification for schedules, employees, absence, and payroll. OAuth2 with scopes. No webhooks — polling required. Good documentation via OpenAPI. Danish company — European payroll compliance is the key value. Partner program required for API access.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Shift creation not idempotent. Employee management idempotent by ID. Absence requests create new records. Read operations idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: No webhooks — must poll for schedule changes
Partner program required for production API access
European labor law compliance built into data models — affects field requirements
Xero acquisition may affect roadmap and API evolution

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant — Danish company with strong EU privacy culture. OAuth2 with scopes. EU data residency. Xero-backed — enterprise security standards. European workforce data handled per local labor laws.
